name: Cake Mix Bar Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 Box Cake mix (Pillsbury Plus Yellow, Butter, or Devil's Food)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first four ingredients in a bowl until almost all the lumps are gone.
2. Add the chocolate chips.
3. Bake in a greased 9 X 13 pan at 350 degrees for 25 minutes.
4. Cool and cut into squares.
Suggested box cake mixes: Pillsbury Plus Yellow, Butter, or Devil's Food. You can also use the Duncan Hines Fudge Marble mix. To make this variation, mix some of the batter with the fudge packet and add a tablespoon or two of water to allow for mixing.
Also, you may want to try butterscotch chips or nuts for variety.
